name: agentic-os
description: Turn Claude Code into your Agentic Operating System.

scripts.test:cron: node --no-deprecation --test src/lib/cron-runtime.test.cjs src/lib/claude-parser.test.cjs src/lib/planned-project-naming.test.cjs src/lib/run-claude-text-prompt.test.cjs src/lib/process-manager.test.cjs src/lib/queue-watcher.test.cjs src/lib/plan-review-flows.test.cjs src/lib/permission-prompt-mcp.test.cjs src/lib/task-chat.test.cjs
scripts.test:memory: node --no-deprecation --test src/lib/memory/scope.test.cjs src/lib/memory/backend.test.cjs src/lib/memory/embedder.test.cjs src/lib/memory/pglite-adapter.test.cjs src/lib/memory/store.test.cjs src/lib/memory/indexer.test.cjs src/lib/memory/ingest.test.cjs src/lib/memory/search.test.cjs src/lib/memory/api.test.cjs src/lib/memory/server.test.cjs src/lib/memory/no-leak.test.cjs src/lib/memory/reindex.test.cjs src/lib/memory/memory-recall.test.cjs src/lib/memory/capture.test.cjs src/lib/memory/postgres-adapter.test.cjs src/lib/memory/backup.test.cjs src/lib/memory/bootstrap.test.cjs
